name: Red Alert
description: Emergency response. Quality first, fix fast, then reassess.

phases.name: Quality
phases.task_template: Phase 1 — Quality: Triage and assess the incident. Goal: ${goal}
phases.checkpoint: Root cause identified and severity assessed

phases.name: Build
phases.task_template: Phase 2 — Build: Apply emergency fixes and verify. Goal: ${goal}

phases.name: Vision
phases.task_template: Phase 3 — Vision: Post-mortem and prevention strategy. Goal: ${goal}
phases.checkpoint: Post-mortem documented and prevention plan approved
